Package neqsim.process.util.fire

package neqsim.process.util.fire
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.util
     
  • Class
    Description
    BlockedInLiquidExpansionAnalysis
    Rigorous, equation-of-state based screening tool for the pressure rise generated when a liquid-full piping segment or vessel is blocked in (isolated with no vapor space and no relief path) and subsequently warmed, per API 521 7th Ed.
    FireHeatLoadCalculator
    Utility methods for estimating fire heat loads for blowdown and relief calculations.
    FireHeatTransferCalculator
    Calculates metal wall temperatures for wetted and unwetted zones during fire exposure.
    FireHeatTransferCalculator.SurfaceTemperatureResult
    Result container for surface temperature calculations.
    FirePreset
    Screening-level fire exposure presets for blowdown, depressurization and fire-rupture studies.
    FirePreset.FireKind
    Classification of the fire type.
    ReliefValveSizing
    Dynamic relief valve (PSV) sizing for fire scenarios per API 521.
    ReliefValveSizing.LiquidPSVSizingResult
    Result container for liquid PSV sizing calculations per API 520 Section 5.8.
    ReliefValveSizing.PSVSizingResult
    Result container for PSV sizing calculations.
    SeparatorFireExposure
    Convenience wrapper that wires separator geometry and process conditions into the fire calculators so they can be used directly from NeqSim process simulations.
    SeparatorFireExposure.FireExposureResult
    Result bundle that exposes all fire-related calculations for a separator timestep.
    SeparatorFireExposure.FireScenarioConfig
    Fire scenario configuration with sensible defaults so callers only override what they need.
    TransientWallHeatTransfer
    Transient 1-D heat conduction through vessel walls.
    VesselHeatTransferCalculator
    Calculates internal heat transfer coefficients for vessel filling and depressurization.
    VesselHeatTransferCalculator.HeatTransferResult
    Container for complete heat transfer calculation results.
    VesselRuptureCalculator
    Implements a Scandpower-style thin-wall rupture check using von Mises stress.
